articles.title: Republicans' sweeping election overhaul fails in the Senate - NPR
articles.description: The SAVE America Act, a far-reaching Republican election overhaul that President Trump said should be his congressional allies' top priority, has failed in the Senate.
articles.content:
The SAVE America Act, a far-reaching Republican election overhaul that President Trump said should be his congressional allies' top priority, has officially failed in the Senate.
The measure was vot… [+3188 chars]
